name: Green Papaya Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place green cabbage pieces on a large serving platter and arrange in layers the papaya and beans.
2. In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic, chopped dried red chilies, sugar, soy sauce, and lime juice.
3. Just before serving, pour the dressing over the salad and garnish with tomatoes, peanuts, and cilantro.
